headline: How The Sabanci Holding (IBSE:SAHOL) Investment Story Is Shifting As Valuation Assumptions Evolve
summary: The latest update on Haci Ömer Sabanci Holding keeps the fair value estimate steady at TRY154.42 per share, indicating that the core price target in the model is unchanged. That stability sits alongside mixed analyst views, with more positive voices pointing to potential upside if execution holds, while cautious ones highlight risks around earnings visibility and the assumptions that underpin this valuation. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could influence the way you...

headline: BofA Names Olena Lifset Oklahoma City President
summary: Bank of America today announced that Olena Lifset, Global Commercial Banking market executive, will become its new Oklahoma City president. She succeeds Tony Shinn, who successfully led the market since 2008, and is retiring after 20 years with the company.

content.title: BofA Names Olena Lifset Oklahoma City President
content.summary: Bank of America today announced that Olena Lifset, Global Commercial Banking market executive, will become its new Oklahoma City president. She succeeds Tony Shinn, who successfully led the market since 2008, and is retiring after 20 years with the company.
